error_signature: Access to the configured URL is not allowed. Check your Firewall.
title: Webhook access issue due to authentication error
symptom: When sending a POST request from Site24x7 to n8n, an error indicates that access to the URL is not allowed. This suggests a potential authentication issue.
applies_when: Using Site24x7 to send POST requests
not_this_if: Webhook workflow is not activated in n8n
root_cause: The error occurs because the authentication credentials (username and password) for the n8n webhook were not entered correctly. This prevents Site24x7 from successfully accessing the webhook URL.
fix_steps: Open the n8n webhook node settings
Ensure the correct username and password are entered
Test the POST request again from Site24x7
agent_instruction: Verify and enter the correct authentication credentials in the n8n webhook settings.
